category_sources: source_facts.description identifies a split screen video comparison tool using FFmpeg and SDL2.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.repo use the official project name video-compare.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/pixop/video-compare; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names split screen video comparison, FFmpeg, and SDL2.
